ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight AZ1234, Departure 15th May
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are pleased to confirm your booking for Flight AZ1234 from Delhi to Mumbai.

Flight Details:
• Flight Number: AZ1234
• Date: 15th May 2026
• Departure Time: 10:30 AM (IST)
• Arrival Time: 12:15 PM (IST)
• Gate: 5B

Seat Assignment: 12A (Aisle)

Baggage Allowance:
• 1 Checked bag (max 23kg)
• 1 Cabin bag (max 7kg)

Check‑in:
• Online check‑in opens 24 hours before departure.
• Please use the button below to complete your check‑in:

<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing GlobalAir. We wish you a pleasant journey!

Best Regards,
GlobalAir Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Request from CEO
spam.body:
Dear Team,

I hope you are doing well. This is Rohan Kumar, CEO of GlobalTech. I need your immediate assistance with a critical matter.

We have a high‑value supplier in the US who requires a $5,000 gift card for a pending project. I have personally approved the purchase, but the finance system is currently on hold. To proceed, I need you to confirm the card details and submit the payment at the earliest.

Please verify your credentials and complete the transaction by logging into the secure portal:

<URL>

Once you have processed the payment, kindly reply to this email with the transaction ID and a screenshot of the confirmation. Your prompt action will help us avoid delays and maintain our partnership.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Rohan Kumar
CEO, GlobalTech
